title: Get Spec Outline Draft
description: Workspace canonical specs are read-only in Studio v1, but the inspector may still need an outline of **unsaved buffer text** (e.g. future edit flows) or consistent API shape. This extends workspace `GetSpecOutline` with optional `content` + `filename` to outline draft bytes without reading `SpecRepository`.
context: Workspace canonical specs are read-only in Studio v1, but the inspector may still need an outline of **unsaved buffer text** (e.g. future edit flows) or consistent API shape. This extends workspace `GetSpecOutline` with optional `content` + `filename` to outline draft bytes without reading `SpecRepository`.

rules: When `GetSpecOutlineInput.content` and `filename` are both set, `execute` MUST return a single outline result from [`core:outline-artifact-content`](../outline-artifact-content/spec.md) and MUST NOT require the spec to exist in the workspace tree.
When `content` is omitted, behavior MUST match workspace `GetSpecOutline` (load artifacts from spec repo, schema-driven filename set).
When `content` is provided without `filename`, the use case MUST throw a clear error (`SpecNotFoundError` or equivalent message).

scenarios.name: Draft outline without workspace spec file
given: content is markdown and filename is spec.md
then: AND spec repository get is not called

scenarios.name: repository path unchanged without content — primary path
when: When content is omitted, behavior MUST match workspace
then: AND no forbidden side effects occur

scenarios.name: repository path unchanged without content — guard path
given: inputs that stress the requirement boundary
then: errors or skips are explicit and documented
